title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 82.700 - Duties of county commission — who to perform in St. Louis
text:
82.700.  Duties of county commission — who to perform in St. Louis. — All acts and parts of acts which provide for the performance of any duty or trust by any county commission in this state shall also include the municipal assembly, and the mayor and comptroller of the city of St.  Louis.
(RSMo 1939 § 15744) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14796
